faqs.heading: Any Ambiguity in Mind? These FAQs Will Help!
faqs.subHeading: Find quick answers to common queries.

items.a: Yes! Yaalo eSIM is built for travelers with coverage in 200+ destinations and no roaming hassles.

items.q: Which eSIM is best for traveling?
items.a: Yaalo offers flexible local, regional, and global eSIM plans for every type of traveler.

items.q: Can I install my eSIM before traveling?
items.a: Yes. Install it before your trip and activate it when you arrive at your destination.

items.q: Can I use eSIM in any country?
items.a: Yaalo supports more than 200 destinations. Check your selected plan for coverage before purchasing.
Most recent Apple, Samsung, Google, and many other smartphones support eSIM technology.

items.q: How do I know if my eSIM is active?
items.a: If mobile data starts working after activation, your eSIM is active.

items.q: What if my Yaalo eSIM doesn't work?
items.a: Contact our support team. We'll help resolve the issue or provide a refund when applicable.

items.q: Can I top up or extend my plan?
items.a: Yes. You can purchase additional data or extend your plan directly from the Yaalo app.
Yes. Yaalo uses secure and encrypted eSIM profile delivery.
